description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 58-61.

Level 21

Heroic Path Advancement

At 21st level, you choose a Heroic Path you meet the prerequisites for and advance its first step. Each time you gain a level, you can advance a Heroic Path by one step, start a new Heroic Path, or, if specified as an option of the current step you’re on, jump from one Heroic Path into another.

Legendary Score Improvement

When you reach 21st level, and again at levels 23 and 25, increase one of your ability scores by 2 or two ability scores by 1. You cannot raise an ability score above 24 using this feature, unless another feature raised your maximum for that specific ability score beforehand.

Expert Hunter (5e)

5e. Also at 21st level, your skill in hunting your favored enemy has translated into almost all quarry you hunt. When you finish a long rest, choose 3 additional favored enemy options. You can change these options after you finish a long rest. You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls against your favored enemies.

Expert Hunter (5.5e)

5.5e. Also at 21st level, your skill in hunting your enemies has deepened. You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls against targets marked by your Hunter’s Mark. In addition, you gain an extra use of your Hunter’s Mark, as shown in the Favored Enemy column in the Legendary Ranger table.

Mythical Technique

At 21st level, you learn a Mythical Technique from the Mythical Techniques section. You learn an additional Mythical Technique at 23rd and 25th levels.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
